services_list.description: We are pleased to announce the acquisition of brand-new 12-channel ECG machines at the Accident and Emergency departments in IHU and WGH. These machines will operate 24/7, providing enhanced patient care. Please contact

services_list.name: Laundry
services_list.description:
Do you need your fabrics clean and neatly ironed? Yes.
Visit our laundry shop at LBH.  We are there to serve you better.

services_list.name: Hire a Bus
services_list.description: Need reliable transportation for medical events, staff retreats, or conferences? Our fleet is available for charter. We offer comfortable, safe, and professional bus hire services tailored to your needs.

services_list.name: LEKAN BADRU HALL
services_list.description:
For your conferences, birthday parties, weddings, seminars, retreats.
Our hall is available to accommodate whatever program you plan to have, and we will give you top-notch service. A trial will convince you.
